Spring Break Reading List

Sun Mar 22 2026 20:00:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

Read over spring break: Warriors: The New Prophecy: Midnight (reread), Capitalist Realism, Speculative Everything (reread), Warriors: The New Prophecy: Moonrise (reread), Exhalation, Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy , Darwin’s Dangerous Idea (ongoing), Mushroom at the End of the World (obligatory) (ongoing), A Scanner Darkly (ongoing)
